action_set_definitions.name: get_workflow_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status and metadata of a policy application from the environment state.

action_set_definitions.name: retrieve_validated_underwriting_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the environment for validated underwriting logs for a specific year. Filters out superseded data.

target_year.description: The year of the logs to retrieve (e.g., 2024).

action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_risk_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves technical risk factors for a specific supplier facility, including SPOF and Hazard Zone status.

facility_name.description: The name of the facility (e.g., Kobe Magnetics).

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_underwriting_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Records the final MFL, sub-limit, and waiting period to the environment to conclude the review.

final_sub_limit.description: The final CBI sub-limit after applying caps.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the insurance policy application
state_description.applicant_profile: Demographic and lifestyle data of the applicant (age, occupation, tobacco use)
state_description.medical_history_logs: Chronological records of medical disclosures or retrieved clinical data
state_description.verification_checklist: Status tracking for various required checks (identity, credit, employment, health)
state_description.internal_risk_rating: A calculated internal score representing mortality/morbidity risk (1-100)
state_description.current_workflow_step: The current stage in the underwriting pipeline (e.g., DATA_GATHERING, RISK_ASSESSMENT, DECISION_PENDING)

medical_history_logs: Archived Log [2022-03-12]: 2022 Preliminary Risk Survey suggests TTR of 45 days and daily impact of $800,000 for Kobe site.
Technical Audit [2024-01-20]: Kobe Magnetics identified as the sole source (SPOF) for drivetrain magnets; no domestic alternate exists.
Inventory Log [2024-02-05]: Apex Precision Motors on-site Safety Stock Buffer (SSB) is verified at 15 days.
Supply Chain Note [2024-02-06]: Secondary supplier Euro-Mag (Germany) holds 60 days of redundant stock, but cannot reach volume requirements for 6 months.
Current Survey [2024-02-12]: 2024 Validated TTR for Kobe Magnetics production line is 90 days due to specialized tooling replacement times.
Financial Review [2024-02-14]: 2024 Daily Gross Profit dependency for the Kobe Magnetics node is confirmed at $1,100,000.
Catastrophe Report [2024-02-15]: Kobe Magnetics facility location Earthquake Hazard Score confirmed at 9 (Extreme).
Logistics Note [2024-02-16]: Total shipping time for Euro-Mag components is 14 days, separate from production TTR.
